release_notes:
Version 2.7.13 - Security & Multi-PC Optimization
✨ New Features & Fixes:
- Core: Implemented unique hardware-based machine identification (Hostname + MAC suffix).
- Security: Prevents machine ID collisions between different PCs.
- WebSocket: Improved device registration and identification.
- Fixed: Resolved 'Device token bound to another PC' issues for same-network installations.
